requirement_topic.en: EFL Grid Connection for BESS — 240/415 V 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and EFL Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: EFL BESS并网——240/415 V 50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及EFL并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: EFL BESS併網——240/415 V 50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及EFL併網要求

summary.en: Energy Fiji Limited (EFL) is the state-owned electricity generation, transmission, and distribution utility in Fiji and the sole grid operator. All grid-connected BESS installations — including utility-scale, commercial, and behind-the-meter projects — require EFL technical review and grid-connection approval under EFL's Grid Connection Guidelines and applicable interconnection agreement terms. Fiji's national grid operates at 240 V single-phase, 415 V three-phase, 50 Hz. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — must be designed, configured, and validated for Fiji's 240/415 V 50 Hz grid. China's nominal low-voltage grid is 220/380 V at 50 Hz: both grids share 50 Hz frequency, but the nominal voltage differs (Fiji 240/415 V vs China 220/380 V). PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and anti-islanding parameters configured for China's 220/380 V must be re-parameterised and retested for Fiji's 240/415 V before grid-connection testing. IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards — including IEC 62933-2-1 (Unit Parameters and Testing Methods) and IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) — are the internationally expected technical references for BESS grid-connection specifications where project owners or EFL reference them in connection agreement terms. EFL's specific published technical specifications for BESS grid connection should be verified directly with EFL before equipment procurement.
summary.zh: 斐济电力有限公司（EFL）是斐济国有发电、输电和配电公用事业单位及唯一电网运营商。所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模、商业及表后项目——均须依据EFL并网指南及适用并网协议条款取得EFL技术审查和并网批准。斐济国家电网运行参数为单相240 V、三相415 V、50 Hz。BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——须针对斐济240/415 V 50 Hz电网进行设计、配置和验证。中国额定低压电网为220/380 V 50 Hz：两地电网共享50 Hz频率，但额定电压不同（斐济240/415 V，中国220/380 V）。针对中国220/380 V配置的PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及防孤岛参数，须在并网测试前重新针对斐济240/415 V进行配置和重新测试。IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准——包括IEC 62933-2-1（单元参数和测试方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）——是BESS并网规格的国际预期技术参考，可能被项目业主或EFL在并网协议条款中引用。EFL专门针对BESS并网的已发布技术规格须在设备采购前直接向EFL核实。
summary.zht: 斐濟電力有限公司（EFL）是斐濟國有發電、輸電和配電公用事業單位及唯一電網運營商。所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模、商業及表後項目——均須依據EFL併網指南及適用併網協議條款取得EFL技術審查和併網批准。斐濟國家電網運行參數為單相240 V、三相415 V、50 Hz。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——須針對斐濟240/415 V 50 Hz電網進行設計、配置和驗證。中國額定低壓電網為220/380 V 50 Hz：兩地電網共享50 Hz頻率，但額定電壓不同（斐濟240/415 V，中國220/380 V）。針對中國220/380 V配置的PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及防孤島參數，須在併網測試前重新針對斐濟240/415 V進行配置和重新測試。IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準——包括IEC 62933-2-1（單元參數和測試方法）和IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）——是BESS併網規格的國際預期技術參考，可能被項目業主或EFL在併網協議條款中引用。EFL專門針對BESS併網的已發布技術規格須在設備採購前直接向EFL核實。

standards_or_laws: EFL Grid Connection Guidelines — technical requirements for generation and storage assets connected to Fiji's national electricity grid (verify current edition directly with EFL)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
AS/NZS 4777.1 — Grid connection of energy systems via inverters (Australian/New Zealand standard with Pacific regional influence; verify EFL adoption status directly)
Fiji Electricity Decree 2009 (Decree No. 50 of 2009) — legislative framework governing electricity supply and connection in Fiji

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's nominal LV grid is 220/380 V at 50 Hz — Fiji's grid is 240/415 V at 50 Hz. Both grids share the same 50 Hz frequency; however, the nominal voltage differs (China 220/380 V vs Fiji 240/415 V), so PCS firmware, protection relays, and anti-islanding parameters must be re-configured and independently validated for Fiji's voltage before grid-connection testing and commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得认可。中国额定低压电网为220/380 V 50 Hz——斐济电网为240/415 V 50 Hz。两地电网共享相同的50 Hz频率；但额定电压不同（中国220/380 V，斐济240/415 V），因此PCS固件、保护继电器及防孤岛参数须在并网测试和调试前重新针对斐济电压进行配置并独立验证。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得認可。中國額定低壓電網為220/380 V 50 Hz——斐濟電網為240/415 V 50 Hz。兩地電網共享相同的50 Hz頻率；但額定電壓不同（中國220/380 V，斐濟240/415 V），因此PCS韌體、保護繼電器及防孤島參數須在併網測試和調試前重新針對斐濟電壓進行配置並獨立驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy EFL's grid-connection requirements for Fiji. Key technical differences requiring attention: (a) grid voltage — Fiji is 240/415 V whereas China is 220/380 V; both share 50 Hz frequency but nominal voltage differs; PCS voltage protection thresholds, ride-through settings, and anti-islanding parameters must be reconfigured and independently retested for Fiji's 240/415 V before grid-connection application; (b) EFL connection agreement terms — engage EFL at the earliest project stage to obtain specific BESS connection technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where EFL or project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) AS/NZS 4777.1 inverter compliance — verify with EFL whether this Australian/New Zealand standard for grid-connected inverters is required given Pacific regional influence; (e) communication and monitoring — confirm the SCADA or monitoring interface protocol required by EFL for BESS dispatch and grid monitoring.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足EFL斐济并网要求。需注意的主要技术差异：（a）电网电压——斐济为240/415 V，中国为220/380 V；两者共享50 Hz频率但额定电压不同；PCS电压保护阈值、穿越参数及防孤岛参数须在申请并网前重新针对斐济240/415 V进行配置并独立重新测试；（b）EFL并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与EFL接触以获取BESS并网具体技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若EFL或项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）AS/NZS 4777.1逆变器合规——鉴于太平洋地区影响，须向EFL核实是否要求遵守该澳大利亚/新西兰并网逆变器标准；（e）通信和监控——确认EFL对BESS调度和电网监控所要求的SCADA或监控接口协议。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足EFL斐濟併網要求。需注意的主要技術差異：（a）電網電壓——斐濟為240/415 V，中國為220/380 V；兩者共享50 Hz頻率但額定電壓不同；PCS電壓保護閾值、穿越參數及防孤島參數須在申請併網前重新針對斐濟240/415 V進行配置並獨立重新測試；（b）EFL併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與EFL接觸以獲取BESS併網具體技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若EFL或項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）AS/NZS 4777.1逆變器合規——鑑於太平洋地區影響，須向EFL核實是否要求遵守該澳大利亞/新西蘭併網逆變器標準；（e）通訊和監控——確認EFL對BESS調度和電網監控所要求的SCADA或監控接口協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EFL grid-connection approval is required for all grid-connected BESS in Fiji under the Fiji Electricity Decree 2009; specific BESS technical requirements are defined in EFL connection agreements — verify current requirements directly with EFL
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Fiji

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy EFL's Fiji grid-connection requirements. BESS PCS must be re-parameterised for Fiji's 240/415 V at 50 Hz grid — the 50 Hz frequency matches China but the nominal voltage differs and must not be assumed compatible without reconfiguration and testing. Engage EFL at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, AS/NZS 4777.1 inverter compliance obligations, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. Direct EFL engagement is essential before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足EFL斐济并网要求。BESS储能变流器须重新针对斐济240/415 V 50 Hz电网进行参数配置——50 Hz频率与中国一致，但额定电压不同，不得在未重新配置和测试的情况下假定兼容。应在项目最早阶段与EFL接触，确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据、AS/NZS 4777.1逆变器合规义务及SCADA/通信协议规格。在设备采购最终确定前，直接与EFL接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足EFL斐濟併網要求。BESS儲能變流器須重新針對斐濟240/415 V 50 Hz電網進行參數配置——50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但額定電壓不同，不得在未重新配置和測試的情況下假定兼容。應在項目最早階段與EFL接觸，確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據、AS/NZS 4777.1逆變器合規義務及SCADA/通訊協議規格。在設備採購最終確定前，直接與EFL接觸至關重要。
